blocks.text: The A.C. generator has a multi-stage variable output voltage according to the power consumption to reduce fuel consumption by controlling the output appropriately. A battery sensor attached to the negative terminal of the battery measures current/voltage, battery temperature, and internal battery resistance and sends signals to the PGM-FI ECU. Based on the signals, the PGM-FI ECU sends appropriate power generation commands to the A.C. generator to generate the necessary power.
*Variable control may not be possible depending on vehicle conditions.
This A.C. generator records the following DTC at the time of failure, so please refer to the relevant DTC failure diagnosis.

rows: A.C. generator B terminal voltage low
